headline: Trump 🍊🔥 Vows Gaza Phase 2 SPEEDRUN 🚀 & Hamas HELLFIRE 😈💥 If No Disarm 🍆🚫
text:
Trump 🍊👑 the BIGLY DADDY 🇺🇸 dropped MIC 🎤💣 on Gaza ceasefire PHASE 2 🕒🚀, chatting with Bibi Netanyahu 🕶️🇮🇱 in Florida ☀️🏖️ like bosses at Mar-a-Lago rave 👑🍹! 'Very QUICKLY bby 👼📈,' says Donnie, but HAMAS 🕌😈 gotta DISARM 🔫🚫 or face HELL TO PAY 🔥👹 – no cap, they AGREE'D but better MOVE FASTER THAN ELON'S CYBERTRUCK 💨🚀 or it's GAME OVER 💥🎮 for those tunnel rats! 

Israel SLAYED 100% 📊💯 the 20-point PEACE PLAN ✌️ despite Gaza BOOMS 💣🏚️ – Trump simping HARD 🤤 for Bibi: 'Not WORRIED about Israel GOAT 🐐, it's the OTHER SIMPS 😩 not disarming!' Phase 2? TECHNO GOV 🖥️👨‍💼 takes over, Hamas DROPS TOYS 🔫💦, IDF pulls out 🛡️🚪, then REBUILD Gaza like Vegas strip 💰🏗️ – but critics YEET 🚫 that Bibi might DELAY 👀 to make Hamas CUCK first 😈🍆! Hamas whines 'DISARM only for PALESTINE STATE 🏳️🇵🇸' – lol cope harder 😂💨. 

Since ceasefire OCT 🗓️, 414 Palestinians ZAPPED ⚡☠️ by IDF per Hamas HEALTH MIN 📈 (sus af 🤨), but Israel says 'RESPONDED to VIOLATIONS 🚫' and blames Hamas for 3 SOLDIER FRAGS 💀🎖️. Meanwhile, Trump EYES Iran 👀🇮🇷 like Thanos snapping NUKE SITES 🧨🚫 – 'We OBLITERATED 'em in June 💥🇺🇸, but if they REBUILD at SECRET SPOTS 🕵️‍♂️, we ERADICATE again NO CHOICE 🔥👊!' Iran COPES 'PSYOP 😂🧠' and vows HARSHER CONSEQUENCES 😡⚔️ after their 12-day Israel beef 🥊🏺. 

Bibi & Trump BROS 👬💥 also TEA-SPILL ☕ on SYRIA 🕌 and HEZBOLLAH 🤬🇱🇧 – Trump hopes Israel VIBES ✌️ with new Prez Ahmed al-Sharaa 🧔🇸🇾 (ex-al-Qaeda BAD BOY 😈 but WORKING HARD 🛠️📈)! 'No CHOIR BOY for Syria, tough COOKIE 🍪👊!' Donnie ended US sanctions 📜🚫 in June – PEACE TRAIN chugging 🚂🌍? Wall Street JEETS? Nah, this MIDEAST ORGY 💦🕌 got more TWISTS than Taylor Swift drama 🎤🍑‼️
